test_E2E_001_NormalUnlockFlow().details: Sequence #1 Lock + Sequence #2 Unlock (Normal Path)      - User locks funds      - 24h time lock passes      - Provers sign (simulated 2/5 threshold)      - Unlock executes successfully

test_E2E_001_NormalUnlock_WithSignatures.details: This test simulates the complete flow including signature verification

test_E2E_002_EmergencyUnlockFlow().details: Sequence #1 Lock + Sequence #3 Unlock (Emergency Path)      - User locks funds      - User requests Emergency unlock with bond      - 7-day time lock passes      - Unlock executes, bond returned

test_E2E_003_ChallengeSlashingFlow().details: Sequence #4: Challenge + Slashing with 60/20/20 distribution      - User locks and requests emergency unlock      - Challenger files challenge with bond      - No defense submitted (or invalid defense)      - Challenge resolved as valid      - Slashing distribution: 60% Challenger, 20% Insurance, 20% Burn

test_E2E_004_VRFTimeoutEmergencyFallback.details: Tests TRIG-001 to TRIG-003 from Sequence #3 spec      - Normal unlock requested (prover tracking starts)      - 72h passes without prover response      - System switches to Emergency path

test_CorePrinciple_CP1_QuantumResistance.notice: [CP-1] Verify quantum resistance (no ECDSA, no SHA-256)

test_CorePrinciple_CP5_Transparency().notice: [CP-5] Verify transparency (events emitted for all operations)

test_E2E_001_NormalUnlockFlow().notice: E2E-001: Complete Normal Unlock flow with all steps

test_E2E_001_NormalUnlock_WithSignatures.notice: E2E-001 Extended: Full unlock with simulated prover signatures

test_E2E_003_ChallengeWithDefense().notice: E2E-003 Extended: Defense submitted, challenge rejected

test_E2E_004_VRFTimeoutEmergencyFallback.notice: E2E-004: VRF 72h timeout triggers Emergency path switch

test_Gas_UnlockBenchmark().notice: Gas benchmark: Unlock should be < 500K gas

test_Integration_StateRootConsistency().notice: Verify State Root calculations are consistent
